meta.title: Product - WebAR SDK for World Tracking, Face Effects, Image Targets, Inline AR
meta.description: 8th Wall's powerful augmented reality SDK is hyper-optimized for the browser and works across all devices. Develop WebAR projects with World Tracking, Face Effects, Image Targets and more.
doty_demo_hero.title: Features
doty_demo_hero.subtitle: Use 8th Wall to build immersive WebAR experiences that work on every mobile device. No app required.
description.world_effects: Built entirely using standards-compliant JavaScript and WebGL, 8th Wall's Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) engine is hyper-optimized for real-time AR on mobile browsers. Features include Six Degrees of Freedom (6-DoF), Lighting estimation, instant surface detection and responsive scale.
description.lightship_vps: Lightship VPS for Web uses Niantic's AR map of the world to anchor WebAR content with centimeter-level precision at locations worldwide. Add VPS-activated locations to the map, or immediately make use of over 100,000 VPS-activated locations, to build location-based AR experiences that work in the browser. Lightship VPS for Web also gives access to the 3D mesh of a location enabling occlusion and physics and a greater level of interactivity between virtual objects and the physical world.
description.image_targets: Bring signage, magazines, boxes, bottles, cups, and cans to life with 8th Wall Image Targets. Upload and manage flat, cylindrical and conical shaped image targets to create web-based augmented reality experiences that are activated by and can track directly to the target. Image targets can work in tandem with our World Tracking, enabling experiences that combine image targets and markerless tracking.
description.face_effects: Create high quality face filters that utilize the full power of the open web and work everywhere. Anchor 3D objects such as glasses or jewelry to a variety of face attachment points. Render a face mesh instantly with our easy-to-use component library or design custom visual effects with shaders, materials and video. 8th Wall Face Effects can be experienced across all devices including mobile phones, tablets and desktops with no app required!
description.modular_framework: Our powerful camera application framework is designed to integrate with computer vision technologies (people occlusion, machine learning models, etc.) and external libraries (voice recognition, multi-player, analytics packages, location services, etc.) by managing the application lifecycle, orchestrating run loops, and providing the needed hooks for high throughput image processing within a web application.
showcase_slide.cloud_based_editor_featur: Cloud-based text editor includes auto-complete, an asset viewer, developer keybindings and support for popular frameworks such as React and Vue.js.
showcase_slide.choose_from_library: Choose from a growing library of sample projects to quickly get started with 8th Wall.
showcase_slide.wirelessly_debug: Wirelessly debug your code in real time with live console logs from multiple devices and send eval commands to test without reloading.
showcase_slide.automated_build_system: 8th Wall's automated build system compiles and minifies projects into a single optimized bundle, providing an instant preview of your most recent changes.
showcase_slide.freedom_to_integrate: The freedom to integrate with any external API or library such as Google Analytics, React, Vue.js, live map data, custom fonts and holographic video streaming.
showcase_slide.allows_multiple_people: Allows multiple people to work on the same project simultaneously, review incoming changes, resolve conflicts and view diffs before landing.
showcase_slide.invite_unlimited_members: Invite unlimited members to join your workspace, manage user roles and permissions, and stay up to date with their changes as you work.
showcase_slide.compare_commits_over_time: Compare commits over time with a full diff view and current client status.
showcase_slide.use_clients_bug_fixes: Use clients for quick bug fixes, independent feature development or exploration.
showcase_slide.publish_rollback: Publish and rollback multiple deployment states instantly. Includes a password-protected staging environment.
showcase_slide.amazon_cloudfront: Backed by Amazon CloudFront, 8th Wall's global hosting service allows you to host your project right at the edge, where your users are, with low latency via 225+ points of presence globally.
showcase_slide.custom_domains: Add a custom domain to your 8th Wall-hosted project, or allowed domains to your self-hosted project.
showcase_slide.generate_qr_codes: Easily generate QR codes, shortlinks, customizable embed buttons and edit project metadata from the dashboard.
device_deploy_section.heading: Develop Once.<1/> Deploy Everywhere.
device_deploy_section.description: 8th Wall's unique Metaversal Deployment automatically makes your Web AR content available across smartphones, computers and AR and VR headsets.
